description: New trick unlocked 🔓✨ ghar ka smart solution 🏠💡 🔥#post #instgram #trending #viral
prompt_text: A young man in a white button-down shirt and grey jeans squats on a rooftop under a bright blue sky. He holds a large metal pot, demonstrating a cooking hack using a yellow plastic bag. Behind him is a traditional clay stove with a small fire. The rooftop is brick-walled, overlooking a village landscape. Bright, natural daylight illuminates the scene.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A young man in a white button-down shirt and grey jeans squats on a rooftop under a bright blue sky. He holds a large metal pot, demonstrating a cooking hack using a yellow plastic bag. Behind him is a traditional clay stove with a small fire. The rooftop is brick-walled, overlooking a village landscape. Bright, natural daylight illuminates the scene.

cinematography.cameraShot: Medium shot, eye-level, static. Vertical orientation suitable for social media.

actions: The man squats and holds a metal pot over a yellow plastic bag.
He pulls the plastic bag over the bottom of the pot to coat it.
He places the pot containing potatoes and water onto a clay fire stove.
After 'cooking', he lifts the pot and pulls off the plastic bag to reveal a soot-free, clean pot surface.
He smiles at the camera, showing off the successful result.
dialogue: Upbeat Hindi folk/pop music plays throughout.
Sound bite: 'Ruko zara, sabar karo' (Wait a minute, have patience).
Sound bite: 'Asambhav! Asambhav!' (Impossible! Impossible!) followed by laughter.
